---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, language support, or CLI command
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A brief description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work:

```bash
# Example CLI usage
node bin/agents.js run --skill my-new-skill ...
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional Context
Links, references, similar tools, etc.
